paper_title: Using DeepSpeed and Megatron to Train Megatron-Turing NLG 530B, A Large-Scale Generative Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **3D parallelism** combining data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism to train a 530B-parameter monolithic transformer model, leveraging DeepSpeed and Megatron frameworks for scalable training across thousands of GPUs.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus derived from Common Crawl and other high-quality web sources
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, zero-shot/few-shot learning, text generation, in-context learning, and state-of-the-art NLP benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable training of monolithic transformer models exceeding 500 billion parameters for improved zero/few-shot generalization
raw_extraction.hardware_used: NVIDIA Selene supercomputer with 560 DGX A100 nodes (8x 80GB A100 GPUs per node), connected via NVLink/NVSwitch and HDR InfiniBand networking
raw_extraction.extension: Topology-aware 3D mapping optimizes communication patterns by co-locating high-bandwidth tensor-parallel groups within nodes while distributing pipeline-parallel stages across nodes.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Using DeepSpeed and Megatron to Train Megatron-Turing NLG 530B, A Large-Scale Generative Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **3D-parallelism** (tensor, pipeline, and data parallelism) and **DeepSpeed + Megatron-LM frameworks** to efficiently train a 530B-parameter model, addressing scalability challenges in distributed training.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpora (including proprietary Microsoft datasets)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding/generation, few-shot learning, state-of-the-art NLP benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable training of trillion-parameter language models while maintaining efficiency and stability
raw_extraction.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPUs, NVIDIA Selene supercomputer, NVLink/NVSwitch interconnects
raw_extraction.extension: **Conditional computation** and **automatic sharding** (via GShard) enable efficient training of massive models across heterogeneous hardware.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Using DeepSpeed and Megatron to Train Megatron-Turing NLG 530B, A Large-Scale Generative Language Model
